title: Oplismenus crus-galli
taxonomy: Oplismenus crus-galli belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This species is a type of grass that is native to various parts of the world. It is classified as a type of annual grass, which means it completes its life cycle within a year. Oplismenus crus-galli is also known to be a weed, often found in disturbed areas and agricultural fields. The species is further classified within the genus Oplismenus, which includes a few other species of grasses.
